query:
SELECT id, name, role, email, active, LEFT(notes,120) AS notes_preview
FROM tutors
ORDER BY active DESC, name;

-- Also show any existing tutorRosterOverride rows so I don't stomp on what's there
SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, note
FROM tutorRosterOverride
ORDER BY week_start_date DESC
LIMIT 10;
